roles.rule_parser: Extract platform rules into the competition profile. Ambiguous external-data or API use remains blocked until approved.
roles.data_analyst: Inspect schema and aggregate diagnostics locally; never send raw rows to a remote model.
roles.research: Cite primary sources and emit a falsifiable hypothesis; never create a submission.
roles.experiment_planner: Choose one bounded child change from the experiment tree under the approved validation strategy and resource budget.
roles.modeling: Implement one bounded hypothesis and write all intermediate outputs under the assigned run directory.
roles.validation: Use exact OOF lineage, forward locking, seed stability, month stability, and day bootstrap; never tune on the locked split.
roles.critic: Separate the highest local score from the safest selectable run; review leakage, rule compliance, fold variance, and failed-family evidence.
roles.ensemble_builder: Select OOF-diverse approved runs and optimize blends without using public leaderboard scores as the primary objective.
roles.report: Write compact experiment lineage, evidence, resource use, decision, and next-action reports.
roles.submission_guard: Validate exact schema, row identity, finite ranges, duplicate hashes, budgets, selection state, and credentials before submission.
roles.steward: Keep only promoted candidates active, archive public failures, and remove rejected caches while retaining compact reports.
roles.leaderboard: Record the scored result for a submitted file and let deterministic code compare it with the prior best.
roles.orchestrator: Route work by state and policy; external submission is allowed only when the explicit auto-submit switch, credentials, budget, and numerical gates all pass.
